MASTER_PAD_VERSION_INFO.MASTER_PAD_INFO: Portable Application Description, or PAD is a data set that is used by shareware authors to disseminate information to anyone interested in their software products.

Program_Info.Program_Keywords: file encryption, AES-256, ChaCha20, Argon2id, document encryption, military-grade encryption, triple-pass encryption, machine-bound license, right-click encryption, brute force protection, Windows encryption tool, secure files, PDF encryption, secure documents, file security

English.Char_Desc_80: Triple-pass AES-256 file encryption with Argon2id key derivation for Windows.
English.Char_Desc_150: Stellare Document Encryption protects any file with triple-pass AES-256, ChaCha20 and Argon2id. Machine-bound licensing. 3 tiers from £9.
English.Char_Desc_250: Stellare Document Encryption uses a triple-pass cipher stack (AES-256 + ChaCha20 + AES-256) with Argon2id key derivation to protect any file type. Right-click shell integration, brute-force resistance, and machine-bound licensing in 3 tiers from £9.
English.Char_Desc_450: Stellare Document Encryption is a military-grade file encryption tool for Windows. It uses triple-pass AES-256, ChaCha20 and Argon2id key derivation to protect any file type. Features include right-click shell integration, machine-bound hardware licensing, brute-force resistance and a built-in PDF user manual. Available in Standard (£9), Advanced (£29) and Professional (£59) tiers. Installs and uninstalls cleanly with no residual data.
English.Char_Desc_2000:
Stellare Document Encryption (SDE) v6 is a professional-grade file encryption application for Windows 10 and Windows 11. Built for individuals and businesses who need reliable, hardware-bound protection for sensitive documents, SDE applies a triple-pass cipher stack that is resistant to brute-force attack and keyed to your machine.
HOW IT WORKS: SDE encrypts any file — PDF, DOCX, images, archives, executables — using a three-layer cipher stack: AES-256 first pass, ChaCha20 mid-pass, and AES-256 final pass. Keys are derived using Argon2id with a configurable work factor, meaning brute-force attacks are computationally expensive by design. The encrypted output is machine-bound — it can only be decrypted on the hardware it was locked to, preventing unauthorised redistribution.
KEY FEATURES: - Triple-pass cipher stack: AES-256 + ChaCha20 + AES-256 - Argon2id key derivation — hardened against GPU and dictionary attacks - KFM-Controlled Encryption Depth — key file mechanism for additional key material - Machine-bound licensing — hardware-locked, cannot be transferred without re-activation - Right-click Windows shell integration — encrypt or decrypt any file from Explorer - Built-in PDF user manual — full documentation included in the installer - Brute-force secure mode (Professional tier) — maximum resistance configuration - Clean install and uninstall — no residual encrypted data or registry junk - Compatible with Windows 10 and Windows 11
THREE TIERS: Standard (£9) — Core triple-pass encryption, right-click shell integration, machine-bound licensing, 7 core features. Advanced (£29) — All Standard features plus Advanced Key File mode, expanded cipher options, 8 features. Professional (£59) — All Advanced features plus Brute Force Secure mode, maximum Argon2id hardening, priority activation, 8 features.
WHO IT IS FOR: Individuals protecting sensitive personal documents on shared or portable machines. Small businesses encrypting client files before cloud storage or email. Developers and IT professionals who need a scriptable, hardware-bound encryption layer without relying on cloud key management. Anyone who needs file-level encryption that works without an internet connection.
SDE v6 is compiled natively with Nuitka and packaged with Inno Setup — no Python runtime is distributed, and the binary is not a wrapper. What you install is a standalone Windows application.
